description: Create a content slide with the headline about traveling population mix by generation, using a two-column layout with a stacked vertical bar chart on the left and explanatory callout text on the right.

header.headline: The traveling population mix by generation remains roughly consistent, but Gen Z growth stalls a bit as millennials gain

items.text: Millennials are major shapers of travel demand in 2026. They represent almost a third of travelers, and have the biggest budgets. For more on high-earning millennials’ unique travel tendencies, see slide 36.
Boomers seem most impacted by the rise in travel and everyday prices. They have the weakest financial perceptions, and are the only generation cutting back on travel budgets. See slide 35 for more.

footer.source: Note: Question: “What activities are you planning to partake in summer 2026 (between Memorial Day and the end of September)?” (n = 1,808). Source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey.
